chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD Cr. Rev. Appl. No. S- 33 of 2025 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 19.01.2026 For orders on office objections For hearing of main case For hearing of MA 4191 /25 Mr. Irfan Ali Talpur, D.P.G. Mr. Altaf Sachal Awan, Advocate files vakalatnama on behalf of applicant and says that under instructions he does not press the instant Cr. Revision Application. Dismissed as not pressed. JUDGE karar_hussain/PS*
